headline: Implied Volatility Surging for TE Connectivity Stock Options
summary: Investors need to pay close attention to TEL stock based on the movements in the options market lately.

headline: RF Industries Gains From Diversification and Backlog Growth
summary: RFIL's growing backlog, expanding cooling business and broader customer mix support stronger growth visibility for fiscal 2026.
